Manage git worktrees

Usage: ez worktree <COMMAND>

Commands:
  create  Create a stacked branch and check it out in a new worktree at .worktrees/<name>
  delete  Remove a worktree and its branch from the stack
  list    List all worktrees with their name, branch, and path
  help    Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help
